featured.title: Changelog #319
featured.summary:
Commit: 90c8906
2026-03-16 (v0.3.2828)
Fixes
#21793 (first contribution) handle multi-byte UTF-8 identifiers in NameGenerator::suggest_name.
#21767 remove crate from EditionedFileId.
#21785 allow duplicate associated type shorthand resolution if it points to the same associated type.
#21820 infer generic args for TraitRef and its associated types.
#21794 validate naming convention for union types.
#21771 make file watcher recursive.
Internal Improvements
#21818 refactor MirLowerCtx to use…
featured.suggestedTitle: rust-analyzer Update: Improved Multi-byte UTF-8 Handling
featured.suggestedSummary: The latest rust-analyzer update (v0.3.2828) addresses a crucial bug fix in handling multi-byte UTF-8 characters, enhancing the IDE experience. This improvement stems from the first-time contribution that resolves issue #21793, ensuring better code analysis and autocompletion for non-ASCII text. Rust developers using rust-analyzer can expect more reliable and accurate code insights, particularly when working with internationalized or complex string data.
